_readme: Run amyloconverter.py and setup will guide you automatically. Or copy this file to settings.json and fill in your values.
_plate_reader: Options: 'fluostar' (FLUOstar Omega) | 'auto' (universal auto-detect for other readers)
_roof_mode: Options: 'fixed' (use the roof_value below) | 'auto' (detect ceiling from data each run)
_roof_value: Only used when roof_mode is 'fixed'. FLUOstar Omega default is 260000.
_chromatic_mode: Options: 'auto' (script picks the best chromatic) | 'manual' (you choose from a table each run)
